action.reasoning:
Observation: Baseline ESM2-35M with 3 epochs on window [540:610] gives val_spearman=0.8858, test spearman=0.8213. Pipeline works. Decision: Try to improve. Key levers: (1) use larger model ESM2-150M, (2) more epochs, (3) wider window or full sequence with attention pooling, (4) better head. Given iteration time was ~52s for 3 epochs with 35M, I have plenty of budget. Let me upgrade to ESM2-150M and train longer (5-6 epochs) with the same window. 150M model has 30 layers, ~640 dim. Training should be ~3-4x slower, so 3 epochs ~3min, 6 epochs ~6min. Very affordable.

Let me also use a slightly wider window [535:615] = 80 chars to ensure we capture all variable positions across all length variants.
action.command: MODEL=150M EPOCHS=5 BS=32 LR=1e-4 WIN_START=530 WIN_END=620 python train.py
